isi.lyrics:
Lyric Dabin - See Through

Romanization

tell you-, tell you-
okay mmm

create unafraid huh
never safe huh
A-R-T mmm
ain’t for the faint heart
knew I made it when I had
bitches sending fake hearts
add colors, all colors
to the spectrum

create unafraid huh
never safe huh
A-R-T mmm,
ain’t for the faint heart
knew I made it when I had
bitches sending fake hearts
add colors, odd colors to the-

yeah

create more, don’t blame me
too fly to owe you shit
played around, do-re-mi
main advice: ownership

tell me, what you’d do if
everything you would touch
turned see through?
I mean, what would you lose
clearly if everything was see through?
cause I waited so long, ah

fuck it, I hug the hate, because it ain’t
you know why they yell the hate?
cause they safe
while they’re feelin’ safe
I shall pave
a hundred billion ways,
acquire taste

you know why I hug the hate?
because it ain’t
you know why you yell the hate?
because you safe
while you fill my safe
I shall pave
a hundred billion- billion- billion-

everything you would touch

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Dabin - Saucer

Romanization

saucer, levitated, wide awake
nae saucerneun meolli bwa I’m wide awake
nae cheolchik geuril daero geuryeonae
light speed
travel in light
light speed

yeah
hue hue
yeah yeah

fuck you talking about
who you talking about

yeah yeah
hue hue

who you talking about

talk is cheap
the height is steep
peep the bit, mi, si
talk is cheap
I show to reap
walk in leaps

in sync
that’s it?
relief
uh oh, that’s it?
that’s it!
that’s it! it! it!

saucer, levitated, wide awake
nae saucerneun meolli bwa I’m wide awake
nae cheolchik geuril daero geuryeonae
want more cheese
so I apply the ‘what’ it takes

translucent in the way I glow
when I beam in alignment
treading my breathe
as I hear warmth
from the belly of her silence

no, I can never misuse this
I could not if I tried
no, I can never misuse this
I gotta heal while I fly

elevated, nae jupasuneun another high
kkaekkeusi I wear my kkaekkeut tie all the time
nae return =
turning time to pieces
like Prada
like Gucci
like double C
like Louis V
it’s a little cliche but

talk is cheap
the height is steep
peep the bit, mi, si
talk is cheap

run in leaps
